item.title: Provisioning flow does not generate or store SSH keypair — FEAT-005 deploy update is undeliverable
item.intent: Every provisioned cloud agent has an SSH keypair generated at provision time, stored securely, and linked in the deploy state. clawhq deploy update has a viable SSH path to every cloud agent it created.
item.description: ProvisionedInstance interface (src/cloud/provisioning/types.ts) has no sshKeyPath or keypairPath field. The provisioning wizard does not generate an SSH keypair or inject it via cloud-init. Without a keypair, clawhq deploy update --id <agent-id> has no way to connect to the remote agent — FEAT-005 is architecturally undeliverable until this is resolved. Steps: (1) Add sshKeyPath: string field to ProvisionedInstance interface. (2) During provisioning wizard, generate an Ed25519 keypair (ssh-keygen or node:crypto), store private key at ~/.clawhq/keys/<agent-id>.pem (mode 0600), store public key path in ProvisionedInstance.sshKeyPath. (3) Inject public key via cloud-init user_data (authorized_keys). (4) Save sshKeyPath to deploy state file on disk. (5) Run cloud/provisioning tests. Scope: types.ts + provisioning wizard + 1-2 provider files for cloud-init injection. No logic change to existing deploy flow.
